features: 6 SES templates rebuilt from knowledge base with full DAPSIWRM coverage
Caribbean template: 87 connections gain polarity, A10 corrected, P13 removed, 5 feedback loops added
Same-type matrix support (p_p, s_s) for pressure-pressure and state-state connections
Domain-specific measures added to all 6 rebuilt templates
KB habitat enrichment: Zostera marina, Cymodocea nodosa, mangrove-seagrass connectivity
5 new validation tests for template structure, orphans, feedback loops, measures
Claude Code automations: pre-deploy skill, kb-audit skill, dapsiwrm-validator subagent

critical.issue: 70+ spurious 'chain completion' connections with no scientific basis
critical.impact: False causal relationships shown to users
critical.resolution: Removed all self-documented invalid connections and orphaned elements

critical.issue: Caribbean A10 mislabeled as 'IUU fishing' — all connections described cruise ships
critical.impact: Element name contradicted every connection description
critical.resolution: Renamed to 'Cruise ship and yacht tourism', fixed metadata

critical.issue: r_r matrix (measure→response connections) silently dropped in CLD visualization
critical.impact: Measures never appeared in causal loop diagrams
critical.resolution: Added r_r and r_mpf to all downstream matrix maps

improvements.issue: Templates had 1 element per category (8 total, 8 connections)
improvements.resolution: Rebuilt from KB: 25-36 elements, 23-39 connections, feedback loops, measures per template

improvements.issue: 3 Baltic habitat entries placed Z. marina in freshwater systems
improvements.resolution: Removed inaccurate entries, kept 4 scientifically verified coastal contexts

migration_notes: No breaking changes — fully backward-compatible with v1.10.x data
Aquaculture template renamed to 'Coastal Lagoon' — filename unchanged
Template element IDs changed from D1/A1 to D001/A001 format
Caribbean P13 (H2S emissions) removed — health impacts covered by S1→I10→W4 chain
